codeReview.summary: Implementation is complete and correct. All required features are present: (1) output file path displayed in full, (2) source vs output size comparison in human-readable format with percentage change, (3) error message display with retry button on failure, (4) cancelled state with retry button. Unit tests cover success, failure, cancelled states, size formatting (B/KB/MB/GB), and edge cases. All 145 tests pass including 27 CompletionDisplay-specific tests.

issues.description: The 'handles zero source size' test comment states the intent but doesn't actually verify the zero-size formatting behavior. The test renders with sourceSize=0 and outputSize=0 but only checks that the filename renders - it doesn't assert that the size comparison section is properly hidden or that '0 B' is displayed. The test passes incidentally because the size section condition `{sourceSize && outputSize && (...)}` evaluates to falsy and skips the section.

The `failed` state requires both `status === 'failed' && error` to be truthy, otherwise returns null. If status is 'failed' but error is undefined, nothing renders. This is defensible but undocumented - the test suite doesn't cover this edge case where status='failed' is provided without an error message.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The component follows the established patterns: CSS modules for styling, useCallback for handlers, JSDoc comments for functions, and vitest + testing-library for tests. No convention violations observed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/renderer/components/CompletionDisplay.tsx follows the same structure as EncodeProgress.tsx

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker followed the frontend-worker skill procedure correctly. The completion-display-component section in SKILL.md specifies: create CompletionDisplay.tsx with output file path display, source vs output size comparison, error message display with retry button, and Open Folder button. The worker implemented all these features and added comprehensive unit tests.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: SKILL.md line: 'completion-display-component: Create src/renderer/components/CompletionDisplay.tsx with Output file path display (full path), Source vs output size comparison, Error message display with retry button, Open folder button (electronAPI.shellOpenFolder())'

sharedStateObservations.observation: No new services were used. The worker only ran npm commands (test, lint, typecheck, build) which are already documented in services.yaml commands section.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff verification shows commands: npm run test, npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run build

sharedStateObservations.observation: The formatSize function correctly handles the byte unit conversion (base 1024) and shows 1 decimal for MB+ but whole numbers for KB and below. This behavior appears to be an intentional design choice not documented elsewhere.

summary: The CompletionDisplay component implementation is complete and correct. All four required features are implemented: (1) full output file path on success, (2) human-readable size comparison with percentage change, (3) error message with retry button on failure, (4) retry button for cancelled items. The worker followed the frontend-worker skill procedure and added 27 unit tests covering all states and edge cases. Two minor non-blocking issues: a test comment that doesn't match what the test actually verifies, and an undocumented edge case where status='failed' without an error message renders null. These are not blocking issues.
